log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 10/67

→ Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Earth Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 55/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
